title: Progressive Disclosure, References, Scripts, and Assets · Mastery Check
summary: Refactor an oversized skill into a compact router and focused resources. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a progressively disclosed skill package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep metadata discriminative within shared context budgets.
Keep SKILL.md complete but route variant details to named resources.
Organize authoritative references by decision point and expected use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
